creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
Found another traceback, this time I have a core file.

(kgdb) bt
#0  doadump (textdump=1) at pcpu.h:219
#1  0xffffffff8095e3c7 in kern_reboot (howto=260) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:452
